_comment: Live tenant domains for post-deploy re-probe (gated-wave-plan.md WAVE 5). Sourced from scripts/verify-protected-tenants.mjs PROTECTED list, cross-referenced against each site's metadataBase/canonical URL in src/app/site/<slug>. Keep in sync with that list when tenants are added/removed. 'confirmed:false' entries have no verified live hostname in-repo -- probe skips them and flags for manual confirmation instead of guessing.

domains.note: gated-wave-plan.md WAVE 6: NS points at cancelled SiteGround zone (SERVFAIL), expect failure until repointed to Vercel.

metadataBase in src/app/site/wash-and-fold-hoboken/layout.tsx incorrectly points at thenycmaid.com (likely copy-paste bug); no verified hostname found in-repo. Matches gated-wave-plan.md WAVE 6 open item 'confirm live domain + fix canonical'. Do not probe until confirmed.
gated-wave-plan.md WAVE 6: nameservers reported unreachable, expect failure until DNS repointed.
